aixm:LinguisticNote.aixm:note: Magnetic bearing value calculated for year 2025
Permission will not be granted for school and training flights within the these periods: 1800–0600 (1700–0500) and on Sundays and legal holidays
School and training flights must only be made after permission has been obtained from ATS
